description: A museum is hosting a members-only after-hours event. An agent at the door must verify membership for entry.

nodes.task_description: Ask the guest for their name or membership card.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the guest's identification information.

nodes.task_description: Look up the guest in the museum's membership database.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the guest's profile and confirms they have an active membership.

nodes.task_description: Allow the member to enter the special event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the member can proceed.
